detail: What you did and why it mattered. Be specific — vague claims don't land. Include the before state, what you changed, and the measurable result.
Another initiative from the same org, or a different angle of the same project. Show range.
Financial impact tends to land hardest. If you have a number, lead with it. Context goes here.
Time saved = automation or process improvement. Translate hours saved into what the team did with that time instead.
Earlier career entry. Shows trajectory. Pick your strongest metric from this role.
Process change entries work well here. Percentage improvements are relatable across industries.
